description: OOS-validated strategy set. 6 of 14 strategies survived out-of-sample testing on 992 cycles (March 28-31, 4 assets). Only strategies with >3% margin above break-even WR (including 3.15% taker fee) are included. m10 bootstrap (40-51% OOS WR) and marginal strategies removed.

conditions.description: Validated strategies: m14 UP resolution (90% OOS WR), m11-m12 momentum (63-84% OOS WR). All have >3% margin above break-even after 3.15% taker fee.

stats.dataSource: OOS: 992 resolved cycles Mar 28-31 (3 days AFTER strategy creation). In-sample: 896 cycles Mar 21-28.

oosValidation.methodology: Fetched intracycle CLOB prices-history for each resolved cycle, checked strategy match criteria at target minute, computed actual win/loss from market resolution. Break-even WR computed as 1/(1 + winROI) where winROI = (1-entryPrice)/entryPrice - 0.0315 (taker fee).

strategies.name: m14 UP resolution [65-95c]
strategies.dataNote: OOS: 161 matches, 90.0% WR. 8% margin above break-even. Widest m14 band = most opportunities.

strategies.name: m11 UP mid-momentum [45-70c]
strategies.dataNote: OOS: 168 matches, 63.4% WR. 5% margin. Low entry price (45-70c) = high win ROI compensates for lower WR.

strategies.name: m12 UP late-momentum [55-95c]
strategies.dataNote: OOS: 313 matches, 84.0% WR. 7% margin. Nearly identical to in-sample (84.3%) = NOT overfit.

strategies.name: m12 DOWN late-momentum [55-95c]
strategies.dataNote: OOS: 277 matches, 83.1% WR. 6% margin. Improved OOS vs in-sample (80.3%) = genuine edge.

strategies.name: m11 DOWN wide-momentum [45-95c]
strategies.dataNote: OOS: 408 matches, 75.3% WR. 4% margin. Widest band = most matches. Slight degradation from 80.2% in-sample.

strategies.name: m11 UP wide-momentum [55-95c]
strategies.dataNote: OOS: 327 matches, 82.9% WR. 6% margin. Nearly identical to in-sample = NOT overfit.
